name: claude-android-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for Android development (Kotlin, Compose, KMP, Navigation, Performance)

plugins.name: android-sync
plugins.description: Keeps android/skills-derived plugins in sync with upstream. Exposes /android-sync:update.

plugins.name: android-core
plugins.description: Always-on Android development skills: Navigation-3, edge-to-edge, adaptive layouts, Compose styles. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-migrations
plugins.description: Android migration skills: XML→Compose, AGP-9, Play Billing, Camera1→CameraX. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-performance
plugins.description: Android performance skills: R8 analyzer, Perfetto SQL & trace analysis. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-wear
plugins.description: Wear OS skills: Compose for Wear OS (Material 3). Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-xr
plugins.description: Android XR skills: Jetpack Compose Glimmer for display glasses. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-testing
plugins.description: Android testing skills: test environment & dependency setup. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-play
plugins.description: Google Play integration skills: Engage SDK. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-security
plugins.description: Android security skills: Intent security hardening. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-ai
plugins.description: On-device AI skills: App Functions. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-identity
plugins.description: Android identity skills: verified email (Credential Manager). Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).

plugins.name: android-devtools
plugins.description: Android developer tooling skills: Android CLI / adb. Adapted from android/skills (Apache 2.0).
